summary: Renders text strings into a texture with control over font, size, color, alignment, and word-wrapping. Supports expressions and dynamic text via DAT references.

key_params.name: text
key_params.note: The text string to render; supports Python expressions with backtick syntax

key_params.name: fontfile
key_params.note: Path to a .ttf or .otf font file

common_gotchas: Large font sizes with word-wrap can be slow — consider caching via a Cache TOP for static text.
For dynamic text, reference a DAT or use expressions; hard-coded text does not update at runtime.
